languages.text: Любые попытки обратить на себя внимание бесплодны.

traits.locale_text: Любые попытки обратить на себя внимание бесплодны.

languages.text: Any attempt to draw attention to yourself is fruitless.
languages.original_text: Любые попытки обратить на себя внимание бесплодны.

traits.locale_text: Any attempt to draw attention to yourself is fruitless.
Any attempt to draw attention to yourself is fruitless.
Any attempt to draw attention to yourself is fruitless.

languages.text: Jeder Versuch, Aufmerksamkeit zu erregen, verpufft.
languages.original_text: Any attempt to draw attention to yourself is fruitless.

traits.locale_text: Jeder Versuch, Aufmerksamkeit zu erregen, verpufft.

languages.text: 无论你怎么试图引人注意，都是白费力气。
languages.original_text: Any attempt to draw attention to yourself is fruitless.

traits.locale_text: 无论你怎么试图引人注意，都是白费力气。

languages.text: Toute tentative pour attirer leur attention est vaine.
languages.original_text: Any attempt to draw attention to yourself is fruitless.

traits.locale_text: Toute tentative pour attirer leur attention est vaine.

languages.text: Tus intentos por hacer que se fijen en ti son infructuosos.
languages.original_text: Any attempt to draw attention to yourself is fruitless.

traits.locale_text: Tus intentos por hacer que se fijen en ti son infructuosos.

languages.text: Dikkat çekmeye yönelik her türlü girişim sonuçsuz kalıyor.
languages.original_text: Any attempt to draw attention to yourself is fruitless.

traits.locale_text: Dikkat çekmeye yönelik her türlü girişim sonuçsuz kalıyor.

languages.text: 目立つことを試みることは無駄だ。
languages.original_text: Any attempt to draw attention to yourself is fruitless.

traits.locale_text: 目立つことを試みることは無駄だ。
